market_summary.Status: KOSPI steady at 14:30; positive sentiment sustains gains through late afternoon.
market_summary.Performance: KOSPI holds at +4.35%. Samsung Electronics, SK Hynix lead. KRW/USD stable near 1489.5.

art_highlights.detail: Continued anticipation for the Pompidou Center Hanwha Seoul (June opening) and the Park Seo-bo Museum.
MMCA Seoul Damien Hirst retrospective remains a key focus for local collectors and enthusiasts.
Seoul continues its momentum with Frieze Seoul and Kiaf Seoul scheduled concurrently for September 2-5, 2026.
